response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The first segment of the video (00:00 - 03:26) features a pure instrumental track with no vocals, so the song lyrics provided in the JSON reference were ignored to strictly respect the Ground Truth Audio Rule. 2. JSON Usage: The JSON reference lacked transcription for the live-action skit at the end, so 100% manual transcription was performed. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the vocal onset of each spoken phrase, with rapid voice-acted arguments segmented for readability.

subtitles.original: Hey, why were you looking at my Raora?
subtitles.english: Hey, why were you looking at my Raora?

subtitles.original: Raora already has my love. It's first come, first served.
subtitles.english: Raora already has my love. It's first come, first served.

subtitles.original: What are you even talking about?
subtitles.english: What are you even talking about?

subtitles.original: Don't take her! No, it's mine!
subtitles.english: Don't take her! No, it's mine!

subtitles.original: Raora's mine now! No, mine! Mine! Mine!
subtitles.english: Raora's mine now! No, mine! Mine! Mine!

subtitles.original: Jay! What on Earth are you playing over here?
subtitles.english: Jay! What on Earth are you playing over here?

subtitles.original: And shouldn't you play something more appropriate for a five-year-old?
subtitles.english: And shouldn't you play something more appropriate for a five-year-old?

subtitles.original: Mom, I'm five, and this is what five-year-olds do. And I thought this was funny.
subtitles.english: Mom, I'm five, and this is what five-year-olds do. And I thought this was funny.

subtitles.original: Oh, you and your daddy are definitely having a conversation about this later.
subtitles.english: Oh, you and your daddy are definitely having a conversation about this later.

subtitles.original: All righty, it's time for your favorite thing: Justice!
subtitles.english: All righty, it's time for your favorite thing: Justice!
